title: The Top of New York
writer: George James Hopkins, Julia Crawford Ivers, Sonya Levien
actors: May McAvoy, Walter McGrail, Pat Moore
plot: Hilda O'Shaunnessey lives in a New York City tenement with her younger, invalid brother, Mickey, and relatives Mr. and Mrs. Brady. Because of Mickey's frail health, the boy spends most of his time on the roof, and Hilda works as a...
